processed.job_summary: This role focuses on developing AI Agent systems using LLMs, implementing RAG, integrating APIs and SaaS tools, optimizing prompts, building evaluation frameworks, and exploring the latest agent research.
key_responsibilities: Develop AI agents using LLMs, incorporating Planning, Tool Use, Memory, and Reflection components.
Implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to connect agents with knowledge bases.
Integrate external APIs and SaaS tools (e.g., Gmail, Notion, GitHub) via Function Calling.
Optimize prompts through Prompt Engineering to reduce hallucinations.
Build evaluation systems for agent performance and reliability.
Explore and apply latest AI agent research and methodologies.

required: Proficiency in Python with async programming (Asyncio).
Experience with web frameworks like FastAPI, Flask, or Django.
Knowledge of SQL/NoSQL databases and vector databases (Milvus, Pinecone, Qdrant, ChromaDB).
DevOps skills: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP).
Familiarity with LLM frameworks such as LangChain, LlamaIndex, Semantic Kernel, CrewAI, or AutoGen.
Experience with LLM APIs from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and open-source models (Llama 3, Qwen, DeepSeek).
Proficiency in prompt techniques: Few-shot, Chain-of-Thought, ReAct, Reflection.
Expertise in RAG pipeline design: chunking, embedding, hybrid search, reranking.
Ability to implement Function/Tool Calling with JSON Schema.
Understanding of Memory mechanisms (context window management, vector store + short-term memory).
Knowledge of Agent architectures: ReAct, Plan-and-Execute, Multi-Agent Systems.
Experience with LLMOps tools (LangSmith, Weights & Biases, Arize AI).
Ability to design evaluation metrics (faithfulness, answer relevance, tool selection accuracy).
preferred: Open-source contributions or projects related to LLM/Agent on GitHub.
Published papers in NLP/AI conferences (ACL, EMNLP, NeurIPS).
Frontend skills (React/Vue) for building agent chatbots.
Experience with fine-tuning models (LoRA, QLoRA, SFT).
